title: God Sword
description: God Weapon Plugin brings the ultimate divine weapon to Minecraft — a single item that combines the powers of a mace, sword, and axe.
body:
God Sword is an overpowered Paper Minecraft plugin that adds one legendary weapon with the combined power of a sword, axe, and mace. This weapon is not just strong — it is smart. It can detect the situation during combat and automatically use the best attack style.

The sword is crafted using 8 Netherite Blocks and 1 Dragon Egg, making it extremely expensive and worthy of endgame survival or SMP servers. Since the recipe requires the Dragon Egg, only the strongest players can create it.

The weapon has three main powers. In normal combat, it acts like a powerful sword for fast and deadly attacks. Against shields and heavy enemies, it works like an axe with crushing force. When the player attacks from a high place, the weapon uses mace-style smash power, making fall-based attacks much stronger.

The Smart God Sword is perfect for powerful SMPs, boss fights, custom survival servers, and late-game PvP. It gives players a true legendary weapon that feels rare, dangerous, and fun to use.

Old features are still included:

Custom crafting recipe OP weapon damage Sword-style combat Axe-style combat Mace-style height-based smash attacks Command to give the sword Reload command

Fully compatible with latest Minecraft (1.21.+ and 26.1+)

Follow me on youtube https://youtube.com/@deadly_man1?si=iAiksgGBgNok67x6
